title: JEFFERSON COUNTY CRISIS LINE - 211info
text: MADRAS MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES JEFFERSON COUNTY CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for individuals experiencing mental health issues, thoughts of suicide, or other crises through a county crisis line. 850 SW 4th Street Suite 302 Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 410-6430 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 410-6430 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for crisis services FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jefferson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines Mental Health Crisis Lines Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUNG ADULTS IN TRANSITION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - WRAPAROUND SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - OPEN ACCESS CLINIC REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - JEFFERSON COUNTY COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MADRAS MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES
